title: User can take a new photo
test_steps: Click on the 'Take New Photo' button.
expected_result: The camera interface should open, allowing the user to take a photo.

title: User can take a new video
test_steps: Click on the 'Take New Video' button.
expected_result: The camera interface should open, allowing the user to take a video.

title: User can select an existing photo or video
test_steps: Click on the 'Sel' | Select an existing photo or video from the gallery.
expected_result: The selected photo or video should be displayed on the screen.

title: User can submit a photo or video
test_steps: Click on the 'Submit' button after selecting a photo or video.
expected_result: The photo or video should be submitted successfully, and a confirmation message should be displayed.

title: User cannot submit without selecting a photo or video
test_steps: Click on the 'Submit' button without selecting a photo or video.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that a photo or video is required.

title: User can navigate to the settings
test_steps: Click on the gear icon in the title section.
expected_result: The settings screen should be displayed.

title: User can search for a different location
test_steps: Click on the search bar and enter a new location.
expected_result: The search results for the new location should be displayed.

title: User can access the advertisement
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the advertisement's landing page.

title: User can access the current location
test_steps: Click on the current location 'Greensboro, NC'.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the current location's weather page.

title: User can access the settings
test_steps: Click on the gear icon in the title section.
expected_result: The settings screen should be displayed.

title: User can access the search bar
expected_result: The search bar should be active and ready for input.
